Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
William Fitzgerald, Esq. 415-722-0673 Fitzgerald Law Offices for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

Discussed. The Court announces these matters are heard in Detp. 206. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ZHIMIN HE'S Motion Of Plaintiff'S Motion For Order Granting Plaintiff S Motion To Effect Service Of Process Upon Defendant Justin Sun By Publication (Via Email/ Twitter)

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for order granting plaintiff's motion to effect service of process upon defendant Justin Sun by publication (via email/Twitter)" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
